meta_desc: Hallucine's privacy policy. Protection of your personal data, cookies and RGPD rights.
s1_p1: When you use the contact or quote request form on our site, we collect the following information: name, email address, telephone number (optional), company name (optional), country and the content of your message.
s1_p2: This data is collected solely for the purpose of responding to your request and providing you with a personalized quote. It is never sold, rented or shared with third parties for commercial purposes.
s2_intro: The data collected is used exclusively for :
s2_li1: Respond to your requests for quotes and information
s2_li2: Provide technical advice tailored to your project
s2_li3: Follow up your order if necessary
s3_text: Your personal data will be kept for a maximum of 3 years from the date of your last interaction with us (last email, last order). After this period, your data will be deleted from our systems.
s4_intro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
s4_acces_text: you can ask to see the data we hold on you
s4_rectif_text: you can request the correction of inaccurate data
s4_effacement_text: you can request the deletion of your data
s4_portabilite_text: you can ask to receive your data in a structured format
s4_opposition_text: you can object to the processing of your data
s4_contact_intro: If you have any queries about your personal data, please contact us at the following address:
s4_delai: We promise to respond within 30 days.
s5_text: This site does not use tracking or advertising cookies. Only technical cookies strictly necessary for site operation may be used (display preferences, browsing session).
s6_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, modification, disclosure or destruction. Communications with our site are encrypted using the HTTPS protocol.
s7_intro: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or the processing of your personal data, please contact us :
